---
title: "City of Olympia, Washington Solid Waste Management Plan"
subtitle: "2022"
number: 18
image: /images/olympia_WA.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Olympia, Washington"
categories: ["Transfer/MRF/Transport"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
